Draft invoices awaiting review and approval. Auto-generated for upcoming cosec retainers and deadlines within 180 days.

Jobs Board PROTOTYPE
Every job in one pipeline — upcoming deadline → in progress → delivered → invoiced. Cosec retainers included. Runs alongside Sales Orders & Client Deadlines; nothing is removed yet.
Upcoming (0)
In Progress (0)
Delivered (0)
Invoiced (0)

New Job
New name → auto-created in the Client Registry on save.
This adds a job to the pipeline (In Progress). Track its dates, then press Issue Invoice when you're ready to bill it — the fee, client and Bill To prefill the invoice.

Wage Allocation
Type A / B / C allocation calculator — linked to invoices
Allocation Settings
e.g. 0.15 = 15%
e.g. 0.10 = 10% of gross
Type A (MBRS/Tax/FS/Bookkeeping): Gross − Disbursements − Abot → × 15% Retention → − KC 10% → Net × 70% Preparer / 30% Reviewer
Type B (Cosec Retainer): Gross − Cecilia → × 15% Retention → − KC 10% → Net × 50% Preparer / 50% Reviewer
Type C (Cosec Other): Gross − SSM Fee → × 15% Retention → − KC 10% → Net × 50% Preparer / 50% Reviewer
InvoiceClientTypeGrossDisb/AbotRetainPreparerPrep AmtReviewerRev AmtKC CommStatus

Team Members
Register team members with bank, payment, and notes. Earnings/payout details are in Payout Summary.
Code Display Name Role Aliases (voucher payee) Bank Account IC / Passport Notes
Note: Adding a member here registers their profile. To make them available in the Preparer/Reviewer/Voucher Payee dropdowns, the person\'s code must also be added to the dashboard\'s hardcoded options (this is a future enhancement). For now, this page tracks bank/IC/notes for the existing team. Member data is saved to your browser\'s localStorage.

Monthly Sales
Invoice value billed per calendar month
What is "Direct"? Invoices billed by Seraya Data Solution directly to the end client, without going through a third-party billing entity (FRAZ, EJ Loh, Prithishan, etc.). These rows have an empty billing_party field.

Live Data Audit
Every distinct invoice job_type and voucher category present in your live data, with current FY totals. Rows in amber are NOT covered by any COA mapsFrom — these transactions show up as "Other" on the P/L. Fix by either editing the COA mapping or editing the offending invoice/voucher.
Invoice job_type
job_typeCountAmount (RM)Mapped to
Voucher category
categoryCountAmount (RM)Mapped to
Reconciliation Report
For each P/L account that has a hardcoded Excel snapshot, this shows the live aggregate and the variance. Click + on a row to expand the contributing live transactions. Or click Auto-reclass all variances to post Journal Vouchers that net out each gap to a "9999 Reconciliation Adjustment" balancing account.
Code Account Excel (RM) Live (RM) Variance (RM) Status

For Revenue accounts, use job_type strings (e.g. mbrs, tax). For Expense accounts, use voucher categories (e.g. wages_et). Special: disbursements_field sums invoice disb_amount.

Sales Order
Invoice Preview
📅 Cecilia's Quarterly Retainer Tracker
Click any cell to mark paid / unpaid
How it works: Each cosec client owes Cecilia RM 75 per quarter for retainer work. Click a cell to mark it paid (date saved). Click again to unmark. The matrix only includes clients with cosec in their services. Different greens = different payment batches by date.
🔍 Allocation Audit — Outstanding Invoices

Adjust spacing, signature & stamp positions. Changes apply live to your preview and are saved automatically. Same settings used for invoice, receipt, and statement.

Quotations & Agreed Fees
What you've agreed to bill this client. Pick a service first, then choose a prescribed item or type your own.
No quotations recorded yet. Click + Add Quotation to record an agreed fee.
Account Ledger
Running balance from invoices & receipts. Click any invoice row to preview the PDF.
FS / Tax Delivery Tracking
Per-financial-year history of draft & final / submission dates, pages, sets and original/photocopy. Updates automatically from the Sales Orders table.

Allocation Setup — per line
Legend: Auto-calculated You input Judgement field Loading…
Line Bill Level 1 deductions After L1 Firm side Net Preparer 70% Reviewer 30% Check
Job Desc # RM Disb Abot Cecilia = Retain 15% Claude 2.5% Koay Comm KC 10% = Who Amt Who Amt ±
How it casts: After L1 = Bill − Disb − Abot − Cecilia · Retain = L1 × 15% · Claude = L1 × 2.5% · KC = L1 × 10% · Net = L1 − Retain − Claude − Koay − Comm − KC · Preparer = Net × 70% · Reviewer = Net × 30%.
📊 Excel Snapshot — line-by-line drift detection
Enter values from your Excel master BS/IS. Saved per-line and persists across reloads. Drift cells turn amber when dashboard differs by more than RM 1.00. Re-open this modal anytime to spot-check that the dashboard still matches your Excel.
Code Account Dashboard (live) Excel value (you enter) Drift
